title: Minecaft: Story Mode [Retold]
description: A Modpack that adds everything we see in Minecraft: Story Mode!
body:
![Adventure, Craft & Victory await you in this Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39228550f6e1e64c13102c4f4deff74fe82d788b.png)

### MAIN FEATURES

**Wither Storm:** The Wither Storm will slowly get bigger and bigger until it destroys the entire world.

**Eversource:** The Eversource lays every spawn egg in the game including the Eversource spawn egg, but it is super hard to find and there is only one that naturally spawns per world.

**No UI's:** You can place items directly on crafting tables, chests, furnaces, anvils, and brewing stands without opening a UI.

**Voice Chat:** You can chat with your friends but only when they are close range to you and there is also cave reverberation so you will echo when you talk in caves.

**Animations:** New player animations consist of crawling, falling, eating, and holding items such as torches and compasses. Mobs also have new animations.

**Story Mode Armor:** Brings iconic Story Mode armors & tools to your world.
Includes new ores, smithing templates, and requires Cracker’s Wither Storm Mod only for crafting Command Tools.

## NOTICE
<details>
<summary>Рус</summary>

**Ultimate Eversource:** 
Если вы решите включить этот замечательный мод перед созданием мира, не выключайте его — иначе вы не сможете зайти в свой мир без него. Включать его после создания мира бессмысленно

**3D Skin Layers и Fresh Moves:** 
К сожалению, этот мод и ресурс пак конфликтуют друг с другом. При включении Fresh Moves 3D Skin Layers перестаёт работать. Придётся выбирать

**Поддержка:**
Если вам известны какие-либо моды, связанные с Minecraft Story Mode, которые, по вашему мнению, должны быть в модпаке, смело делитесь ими со мной — на сервере Discord или мне в ЛС. Я изучу их в кратчайшие сроки и рассмотрю возможность добавления.

**Forge:**
Этот модпак создан для Forge, поэтому, пожалуйста, не предлагайте моды, которые предназначены только для Fabric. Кроме того, модпак не будет сделан для Fabric, так как главный мод — Cracker’s Wither Storm Mod — недоступен для Fabric.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Eng</summary>

**Ultimate Eversource:** 
If you decide to enable this wonderful mod before creating the world, don’t turn it off — otherwise, you won’t be able to enter the world without it. There’s no point in enabling it after the world has been created

**3D Skin Layers & Fresh Moves:**
Unfortunately, these mod and resource pack conflict with each other. When enabling Fresh Moves, 3D Skin Layers stops working. You’ll have to choose

**Support:**
If you know of any mods related to Minecraft Story Mode that you think should be included in the modpack, feel free to share them with me — either on the Discord server or via direct message. I’ll review them as soon as possible and consider adding them.

**Forge:**
This modpack is for Forge, so please don’t suggest mods that are only for Fabric. Additionally, the modpack won’t be made for Fabric, as the main mod — Cracker’s Wither Storm Mod — isn’t available for Fabric.

</details>
